WELCOME TO THE CMA WIZARD

This CMA wizard is here to assist with the creation of a CMA Packet. Each step in the process asks for specific information for inclusion in the package. You can save a Presentation at any point in the process and return to complete it at a later time. You can also move directly to any section of a CMA package via the tree menu to the left to access and edit any information. Begin the process by assigning a name to your CMA Presentation:
